description:
KINDA LAGGY

paint to your heart's desires! (with 10 colors, on an 8x8 canvas)
controls: arrows to move. jump to switch color. dash to switch color backwards. to win, select the gear at the top right
WARNING: will take a while to fully initialize. also, dont press a diagonal at once, it will break the machine.

yea im just miking my dot matrix dissplay dry aaaaaa

had to be nerfed from 15x8 bc lag
title: paint
